positive: A whimsical and stylish illustration featuring a friendly, stylized fox reading a vintage book in a lush, bioluminescent forest setting. The fox has a clean, geometric silhouette and warm autumnal tones (burnt orange, deep gold, forest green). The composition should be centered and highly detailed, designed for full-coverage apparel printing. Utilize a blend of clean vector art and painterly mixed media style, emphasizing strong contrast and clear linework. The scene should feel magical and inviting, with glowing flora and subtle mist. Highly detailed, symmetrical composition, studio lighting, perfect print quality.
negative: photorealistic, signature, watermark, logo, text, blurred, grain, artifact, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low detail, muddy colors, poor composition
